author: Matthew Rockwell
name: Int6 + MLP 3x + NorMuon + SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + Sliding Window
blurb: 9L 512dim MLP 3x, int6 quantization, fp16 tied embedding, NorMuon with weight decay, SmearGate + BigramHash token-pair embedding, orthogonal + muP init, sliding window eval stride=256. 8xH100 SXM.
